summary: Iteration_3 validated 3 NEW features: (1) Home hero now fetches /api/hero-banners and renders the seeded CMS banner 'Spend & Win the Night' with subtitle, 'Shop Now Lah' CTA -> /products; (2) ProductCard countdown overlay on the active Chardonnay flash-sale ticks every second ('Ends in 01:54:52' -> '01:54:48' in 3.5s) using data-testid=countdown-{product_id}; (3) Login /login renders 'Continue with Google' button (data-testid=login-google-btn) that redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=<origin>/dashboard with NO hardcoded fallback. AuthCallback handler correctly renders 'Signing You In...', POSTs to /api/auth/google-session, and on 401 redirects to /login?error=google. Backend google-session endpoint returns 400 on empty body and 401 on invalid session_id as specified. All 22 pytest backend tests PASS (100%). Existing regressions (customer login, products grid, hero-banners CRUD, checkout staff_whatsapp, gold/platinum tier discounts, newsletter, AI chat) all still pass.

minor.issue: Returns 401 on anonymous page loads (no token) generating console errors. Frontend AuthProvider should guard the call when no session cookie/token exists. Carried over from iteration_2 - still not fixed.

action_items: (carry-over, minor) Guard the /api/auth/me call in AuthProvider so anonymous public-page visits don't spam 401s in the browser console.
Confirm cart-hydration lazy-init fix from iteration_2 is still in place (was not re-tested in this iteration as it was out of scope).
critical_code_review_comments: AuthCallback flow correctly follows the Emergent Google Auth playbook: no hardcoded URLs, redirect uses window.location.origin + '/dashboard', synchronous AuthCallback mount in App.js before any other route, AuthProvider skips initial /me check when hash contains 'session_id='. Implementation is correct.
Backend POST /api/auth/google-session matches contract: 400 'session_id required' on empty body, 401 'Invalid session ID' on bogus id, sets httponly/secure/samesite=none cookie on success.

useCountdown hook in ProductCard.js ticks via setInterval; returns null when expired (auto-hides overlay). Verified: text changes within 3.5s. The countdown also handles unmount cleanup (verified by code review).
Hero loader in Home.js gracefully falls back to DEFAULT_HERO slides when /api/hero-banners returns empty or errors - good defensive coding.
Console still emits 401 noise on anonymous page loads (minor, carried over).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 3 new features + key regressions

test_credentials: Used yash@masterliqours.my/Admin123!, jojo@masterliqours.my/Admin123!, customer1-3@test.com/Test123! — all logins succeeded.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data — used existing seeded hero banner (banner_id 0787a4a2...) and active flash sale on Chardonnay (sale_id 4865dbd0..., ends 2026-06-02T20:49 UTC, ~2h window from current server time 2026-06-02T18:54 UTC).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (CMS hero, flash-sale countdown timer, Google OAuth button + AuthCallback) work end-to-end. Backend /api/auth/google-session returns correct 400/401. Frontend redirect URL is constructed correctly with encodeURIComponent(origin + '/dashboard') per Emergent playbook — DO NOT add any fallback or hardcoded URL. The countdown overlay ticks every 1s and auto-hides on expiry (verified via code; for explicit auto-hide test, seed a flash sale with end_time ~5s in future and wait 8s — not done in this run as the existing 2h-window sale was sufficient to validate ticking). One persistent minor issue: /api/auth/me 401 spam on anonymous pages (recommend AuthProvider guard).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no new bugs found this iteration.
